text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, September 01. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Checking on some house maintenance items. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. I can help troubleshoot that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning a street block party soon. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Social breaks are great. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Prepping school lunches for the week. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. I've got the grocery list ready. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: That sounds like a sweet moment. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! That's a big step. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! That is a clean implementation. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the kitchen sink area has a problem. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Automations are great when they work. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've noted the plans. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Meal planning saves so much time. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Great progress. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Researching rover power systems in depth. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. That is a clean implementation. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
